Class VehiclesService

java.lang.Object
com.pitlane.pitlane.service.VehiclesService
@Service public class VehiclesService extends Object
Vehicle Service

  • Constructor Details

    • VehiclesService

      public VehiclesService()

  • Method Details

    • createVehicle

      @Transactional public Vehicle createVehicle(User user, Vehicle vehicle)
      Creates a vehicle for the logged user
      Parameters:
      user - The logged user
      vehicle - The information necessary to create the vehicle
      Returns:
      The created vehicle

    • updateVehicle

      @Transactional public UpdateVehicleDto updateVehicle(User user, UpdateVehicleDto vehicleDto)
      Updates a vehicle with the provided information
      Parameters:
      user - The logged user
      vehicleDto - The vehicle creation information
      Returns:
      The object with the new information to update the frontend without a refresh

    • getUserVehicles

      @Transactional public List<VehicleResponseDto> getUserVehicles(User user)
      Gets all the vehicles for the logged user in the dashboard page
      Parameters:
      user - The logged user
      Returns:
      A list with all the user vehicles, returning empty if there is no vehicle associated to the user

    • getUserVehicle

      @Transactional public Optional<VehicleDetailResponseDTO> getUserVehicle(UUID id, User user)
      Gets a vehicle by an id and the user who owns it
      Parameters:
      id - The vehicle id
      user - The logged user
      Returns:
      The vehicle detail if it is present

    • calculateAlertMessage

      public String calculateAlertMessage(Vehicle vehicle)
      Generates an alert message to show in the vehicle card based on its alerts
      Parameters:
      vehicle - The vehicle in the card
      Returns:
      A string with the message

    • setNewMileage

      @Transactional public int setNewMileage(UUID vehicleId, User user, int newMileage)
      Updates vehicle mileage and adds the old mileage to the logs
      Parameters:
      vehicleId - The vehicle id
      user - The logged user
      newMileage - The new mileage to update
      Returns:
      The new mileage updated
